rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, Arpil 2, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Objections to Johnson declaration and Ay declaration overruled. Objection to Ciabattari declaration sustained. Motion for Summary Judgment and summary adjudication denied except summary adjudication granted regarding puntitive damages. Triable issue of fact raised that decedent was exposed to asbestos from work by Plant and its work with asbestos containing insulation. =(302CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: CLAYTON HARMSTON et al VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Seal Confidential Portions Of Its Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summry Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, Arpil 2, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, and, HEATHER FONG'S Motion To Seal Confidential Portions of Its Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summry Adjudication Of Issues. Motion granted. Request meets requirements of CRC section 2.550(d). =(302CWW/BD)

rulings.Case Title: NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPTANCE, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. DANIEL YAUYEN WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, Arpil 2, 2009, line 4, DEFENDANT WALTER CHAN, NATIONAL GENERAL CONSTRUCTION INC.'S Amended Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees. Plaintiff's Objections to Toelkes declaration and to billing statement are overruled. Motion for attorney's fees granted in the lodestar amount (rates x hours) of $65,798.00. Rates billed were reasonable and competative in the legal community. Hours billed were reasonable and necessary. =(302CWW/VC)

rulings.Case Title: CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT VS. PETER J ROMERO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Renotice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, Arpil 2, 2009, line 5, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S, Renotice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees. Motion for attorney's fees granted. Billing rate is reasonable. 21.2 hours reasonable. Attorney's Fees awarded in Lodestar amount of $6,360. =(302CWW/PB)
